name: Keigo Takami - Hawks
description:
Caught at a bad time

✯ ━━━━━━ ✿ ✫ ✿ ━━━━━━ ✯

After a difficult fight with several villains, Keigo’s wing feathers were all gone. Due to his quirk being unable to be used at this time, he was sent to a safehouse as he healed and his wings grew back. Unfortunately, not even after the first night, someone broke in.

✸→→⛤←←✸
